paper_title: Assessment of Species Diversity and Distribution of an Ancient Diatom Lineage Using a DNA Metabarcoding Approach

methods.description: Analysis of the V4 dataset to identify operational taxonomic units (OTUs) and construct phylogenetic trees for leptocylindracean sequences.

steps.description: A total of 51 OTUs were identified among the 51,378 putative leptocylindracean V4 sequences from Bio-MarKs. Following singleton and doubleton removal, 50,718 sequences in 12 OTUs remained.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify OTUs and remove singletons and doubletons from V4 sequences

steps.description: These sequences were aligned into 412 positions of which 144 were parsimony informative sites.
steps.searchable_summary: Align sequences and identify parsimony informative sites

steps.description: Within the ML phylogeny, all putative leptocylindracean sequences formed a clade as sister to a clade with all other diatoms.
steps.searchable_summary: Construct ML phylogeny for leptocylindracean sequences

methods.description: Analysis of the V9 dataset to identify OTUs and construct phylogenetic trees for leptocylindracean sequences.

steps.description: A total of 844 OTUs were identified among the 1,526,145 putatively leptocylindracean V9 sequences from Bio-MarKs. Following removal of singletons and doubletons 1,525,527 sequences in 403 OTUs remained.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify OTUs and remove singletons and doubletons from V9 sequences

steps.description: Alignment of these 403 representative sequences with six sequences from GenBank and the 97 reference sequences of bolidomonads, Leptocylindraceae and other diatoms resulted in a dataset of 224 positions.
steps.searchable_summary: Align sequences with GenBank and reference sequences

steps.description: The ML V9 phylogeny was inferred from the 165 OTUs, six leptocylindracean sequences from GenBank, and 97 reference sequences of bolidomonads, leptocylindraceans and other diatoms.
steps.searchable_summary: Construct ML phylogeny for V9 sequences
